channel.title: Dirty Chai on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Dirty Chai on Barista At Home

item.title: Chai Latte Recipe: How to Make It at Home (3 Ways + Dirty Chai)
item.description: Make a better chai latte at home than anything Starbucks serves. Three methods: from-scratch spice blend, concentrate shortcut, and tea bag. Includes dirty chai with espresso.

item.title: Iced Chai Latte Recipe (Classic + Dirty Iced Chai with Espresso)
item.description: How to make an iced chai latte at home — cold-steeped chai concentrate, homemade spice blend, and the dirty iced chai version with a shot of espresso. Better than Starbucks.

item.title: Dirty Chai Latte Recipe (Hot & Iced)
item.description: Make a dirty chai latte at home — chai tea spiced with cardamom, cinnamon, and ginger, combined with a shot of espresso. Hot or iced, better than any coffee shop version.
